entities.name: Fitbit
entities.context: Wearable fitness tracker used as a data source for workout observations

entities.name: workout_observations
entities.context: Database table storing workout observation records with source, external_id, and duration

entities.name: build_plan
entities.context: Function that analyzes workout observations and identifies duplicate groups

entities.name: Deduplication
entities.context: Logic to detect duplicate Fitbit observations sharing the same external_id

entities.name: external_id
entities.context: Identifier used to match and group duplicate workout observations from external sources

entities.name: manual_text
entities.context: Manual data entry source for workout observations, distinct from automated Fitbit sync

relationships.context: Fitbit is a source that feeds workout observation records into the database
Manual text entry is an alternative source for workout observations
build_plan function implements deduplication by grouping observations with matching external_id
build_plan groups duplicate observations by their shared external_id
Duplicate detection relies on matching external_id values across observations
